testcase.name: ac3_invalidPassword_returns401
testcase.system-out:
19:20:24.772 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.northbank.registration.auth.CustomerLoginIntegrationTest]: CustomerLoginIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 19:20:24.956 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.northbank.registration.RegistrationApplication for test class com.northbank.registration.auth.CustomerLoginIntegrationTest 19:20:25.168 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.images.PullPolicy -- Image pull policy will be performed by: DefaultPullPolicy() 19:20:25.174 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.ImageNameSubstitutor -- Image name substitution will be performed by: DefaultImageNameSubstitutor (composite of 'ConfigurationFileImageNameSubstitutor' and 'PrefixingImageNameSubstitutor') 19:20:25.242 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Testcontainers version: 1.20.3 19:20:25.503 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.dockerclient.DockerClientProviderStrategy -- Loaded org.testcontainers.dockerclient.NpipeSocketClientProviderStrategy from ~/.testcontainers.properties, will try it first 19:20:25.869 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.dockerclient.DockerClientProviderStrategy -- Found Docker environment with local Npipe socket (npipe:////./pipe/docker_engine) 19:20:25.871 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Docker host IP address is localhost 19:20:25.899 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Connected to docker: Server Version: 27.1.1 API Version: 1.46 Operating System: Docker Desktop Total Memory: 7531 MB Labels: com.docker.desktop.address=npipe://\\.\pipe\docker_cli 19:20:25.963 [main] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.9.0 -- Creating container for image: testcontainers/ryuk:0.9.0 19:20:26.095 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.RegistryAuthLocator -- Failure when attempting to lookup auth config. Please ignore if you don't have images in an authenticated registry. Details: (dockerImageName: testcontainers/ryuk:0.9.0, configFile: C:\Users\aleks\.docker\config.json, configEnv: DOCKER_AUTH_CONFIG). Falling back to docker-java default behaviour. Exception message: Unrecognized token 'credentials': was expecting ('true', 'false' or 'null') at [Source: credentials not found in native keychain; line: 1, column: 12] 19:20:26.267 [main] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.9.0 -- Container testcontainers/ryuk:0.9.0 is starting: 6108b80a1ba3ae6a5f2b7a626ce368d16ae16a96c5366bfd0820007e1bd52b9d 19:20:26.879 [main] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.9.0 -- Container testcontainers/ryuk:0.9.0 started in PT0.9157342S 19:20:26.891 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.RyukResourceReaper -- Ryuk started - will monitor and terminate Testcontainers containers on JVM exit 19:20:26.891 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Checking the system... 19:20:26.891 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- ✔︎ Docker server version should be at least 1.6.0 19:20:26.892 [main] INFO tc.postgres:16-alpine -- Creating container for image: postgres:16-alpine 19:20:26.971 [main] INFO tc.postgres:16-alpine -- Container postgres:16-alpine is starting: 4301c7921cafbbf34419379728aee9916fd3780d4d7bf4fab0bdd033600698d0 19:20:29.550 [main] INFO tc.postgres:16-alpine -- Container postgres:16-alpine started in PT2.6581934S 19:20:29.551 [main] INFO tc.postgres:16-alpine -- Container is started (JDBC URL: jdbc:postgresql://localhost:52821/testdb?loggerLevel=OFF)

2026-06-03T19:20:30.001+03:00 INFO 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.auth.CustomerLoginIntegrationTest : Starting CustomerLoginIntegrationTest using Java 21.0.9 with PID 28584 (started by aleks in C:\BazylBohdad\ai-coursework\ai-coursework\backend) 2026-06-03T19:20:30.003+03:00 INFO 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.auth.CustomerLoginIntegrationTest : The following 1 profile is active: "test" 2026-06-03T19:20:34.250+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: PostgreSQLDialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-06-03T19:20:36.649+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-06-03T19:20:36.690+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] r$InitializeUserDetailsManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with an AuthenticationProvider bean. UserDetailsService beans will not be used for username/password login. Consider removing the AuthenticationProvider bean. Alternatively, consider using the UserDetailsService in a manually instantiated DaoAuthenticationProvider. 2026-06-03T19:20:37.553+03:00 INFO 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.auth.CustomerLoginIntegrationTest : Started CustomerLoginIntegrationTest in 7.962 seconds (process running for 13.853) 2026-06-03T19:20:38.932+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Failed login attempt 1/5 for customer id=c2a7bc6c-16a8-4247-8920-b95c6200abe3 2026-06-03T19:20:38.935+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login

testcase.name: ac4_fourFailedAttempts_doesNotLockAccount
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-03T19:20:39.588+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Failed login attempt 1/5 for customer id=da55f2b6-49f6-4263-9c32-068da5865952 2026-06-03T19:20:39.589+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login 2026-06-03T19:20:39.854+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Failed login attempt 2/5 for customer id=da55f2b6-49f6-4263-9c32-068da5865952 2026-06-03T19:20:39.854+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login 2026-06-03T19:20:40.104+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Failed login attempt 3/5 for customer id=da55f2b6-49f6-4263-9c32-068da5865952 2026-06-03T19:20:40.104+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login 2026-06-03T19:20:40.350+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Failed login attempt 4/5 for customer id=da55f2b6-49f6-4263-9c32-068da5865952 2026-06-03T19:20:40.350+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login

testcase.name: ac4_fiveFailedAttempts_locksAccount
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-03T19:20:40.925+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Failed login attempt 1/5 for customer id=c61e6811-ec2d-4f58-bb6d-80204ca569f6 2026-06-03T19:20:40.925+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login 2026-06-03T19:20:41.175+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Failed login attempt 2/5 for customer id=c61e6811-ec2d-4f58-bb6d-80204ca569f6 2026-06-03T19:20:41.176+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login 2026-06-03T19:20:41.425+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Failed login attempt 3/5 for customer id=c61e6811-ec2d-4f58-bb6d-80204ca569f6 2026-06-03T19:20:41.426+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login 2026-06-03T19:20:41.683+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Failed login attempt 4/5 for customer id=c61e6811-ec2d-4f58-bb6d-80204ca569f6 2026-06-03T19:20:41.683+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login 2026-06-03T19:20:41.970+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Account id=c61e6811-ec2d-4f58-bb6d-80204ca569f6 LOCKED after 5 consecutive failed login attempts 2026-06-03T19:20:41.971+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Locked account login attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login

testcase.name: ac4_successAfterFailures_resetsCounter
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-03T19:20:42.598+03:00 INFO 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.auth.sms.StubSmsService : [STUB SMS] OTP for +14155552671: 467223 2026-06-03T19:20:42.599+03:00 INFO 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.otp.OtpService : OTP session created for customer id=83d876bd-2f41-4621-8466-263b2a4657b6 2026-06-03T19:20:42.599+03:00 INFO 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Login step-1 success for customer id=83d876bd-2f41-4621-8466-263b2a4657b6

testcase.name: ac5_lockedAccount_wrongPassword_returns423

testcase.name: ac5_lockedAccount_returns423Immediately
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-03T19:20:44.268+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Login attempt against LOCKED account id=1e6c78e6-1849-49b2-a8fc-726ebb46fce5 2026-06-03T19:20:44.268+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Locked account login attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login

testcase.name: ac3_unknownEmail_returns401
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-03T19:20:44.300+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Login attempt for unknown email domain: *@example.com 2026-06-03T19:20:44.301+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login

testcase.name: ac3_invalidPassword_incrementsFailedLoginAttemptsInDb
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-03T19:20:44.826+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Failed login attempt 1/5 for customer id=45c5f8e4-c0fd-43bc-8fae-299323286eaa 2026-06-03T19:20:44.827+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Invalid credentials attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login

testcase.name: ac5_lockedAccount_dbStateUnchangedAfterAttempt
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-03T19:20:45.095+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Login attempt against LOCKED account id=eeaae678-c1e8-4709-b898-ae308efc2578 2026-06-03T19:20:45.096+03:00 WARN 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.s.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : Locked account login attempt at URI: /api/v1/auth/login

testcase.name: ac1_loginEndpoint_isReachable
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-03T19:20:45.609+03:00 INFO 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.r.auth.sms.StubSmsService : [STUB SMS] OTP for +14155552671: 801957 2026-06-03T19:20:45.610+03:00 INFO 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.otp.OtpService : OTP session created for customer id=dbae46e6-6b4b-47b2-9af7-da8c53fb1f8b 2026-06-03T19:20:45.610+03:00 INFO 28584 --- [northbank-registration] [ main] c.n.registration.auth.login.AuthService : Login step-1 success for customer id=dbae46e6-6b4b-47b2-9af7-da8c53fb1f8b
